subject: [tasks-system-redesign] [P2] Add filePath and tags columns to pulse_schedules schema
description:
Add the `filePath` and `tags` columns to the `pulse_schedules` Drizzle schema and drop existing data.

## Schema Changes

In `packages/db/src/schema/tasks.ts` (renamed from `pulse.ts` in Phase 1), add two columns to the `pulseSchedules` table:

```typescript
export const pulseSchedules = sqliteTable('pulse_schedules', {
  id: text('id').primaryKey(),
  name: text('name').notNull(),
  description: text('description'),
  cron: text('cron'),
  timezone: text('timezone').notNull().default('UTC'),
  prompt: text('prompt').notNull(),
  cwd: text('cwd'),
  agentId: text('agent_id'),
  enabled: integer('enabled', { mode: 'boolean' }).notNull().default(true),
  maxRuntime: integer('max_runtime'),
  permissionMode: text('permission_mode').notNull().default('acceptEdits'),
  status: text('status', {
    enum: ['active', 'paused', 'pending_approval'],
  })
    .notNull()
    .default('active'),
  filePath: text('file_path').notNull(), // NEW — absolute path to the .md file on disk
  tags: text('tags_json').notNull().default('[]'), // NEW — JSON-serialized string[] for filtering
  createdAt: text('created_at').notNull(),
  updatedAt: text('updated_at').notNull(),
});
```

The `filePath` column is `NOT NULL` — every task must be backed by a file. The `tags` column stores a JSON array of strings, defaulting to `'[]'`.

## Drop existing data

This is an alpha project. Create a migration or startup routine that:
1. Drops all rows from `pulse_runs` (references schedule IDs that will no longer exist)
2. Drops all rows from `pulse_schedules`
3. The schema change (adding NOT NULL `filePath`) takes effect on the empty table

If using Drizzle's push mechanism (`drizzle-kit push`), the NOT NULL column on an existing table with data would fail. Dropping data first avoids this.

Alternatively, if the project uses `drizzle-kit push` for schema sync (not formal migrations), simply adding the column and dropping data beforehand via a startup script works.

## Update shared types

In `packages/shared/src/schemas.ts`, add `filePath` and `tags` to the `TaskSchema` (renamed from `PulseScheduleSchema`):

```typescript
export const TaskSchema = z.object({
  // ... existing fields ...
  filePath: z.string(), // absolute path to .md file
  tags: z.array(z.string()).default([]),
  // ... existing fields ...
});
```

Update the `Task` type (renamed from `PulseSchedule`) to include `filePath: string` and `tags: string[]`.

Update `CreateTaskInput` to include optional `tags?: string[]`.
Update `UpdateTaskRequest` to include optional `tags?: string[]`.

## Update TaskStore

Update `TaskStore` (renamed from `PulseStore` in Phase 1) to include `filePath` and `tags` in all insert/update/select operations. The `tags` field must be JSON-serialized on write and JSON-parsed on read.

## Acceptance Criteria
- `pulse_schedules` table has `file_path TEXT NOT NULL` and `tags_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'`
- Existing schedule and run data is dropped on startup (alpha clean slate)
- `TaskSchema` and `Task` type include `filePath` and `tags`
- `TaskStore` CRUD methods handle `filePath` and `tags` (JSON serialization)
- `pnpm typecheck` passes
activeForm: Adding filePath and tags columns to pulse_schedules schema
